vizier_mandate_focus.title: Mandate focus
vizier_mandate_focus.dialog: Your royal mandate still hangs over the year. A focused push can buy progress — if you authorize it.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: National happiness nudge toward the mandate

vizier_public_triumph.title: Public triumph
vizier_public_triumph.dialog: A modest triumph parade would lift spirits and burnish the score — unless the people are already too weary to cheer.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: +happiness and a small pending score bonus

vizier_court_survey.title: Court survey
vizier_court_survey.dialog: Let the scribes walk the wards and report what the people actually want. A little attention buys goodwill — and a cleaner ledger of your reign.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: +happiness and a small pending score bonus
